@kamino

Security: Open source, 18 audits
Products: Lending Vaults, Multiply, Borrow, LP and leverage
Highest APY on USDC: Vault (5.7%), Multiply (24%)
Liquidity: High, TVL $2.2B

@jup_lend

Security: Open source, 7 audits
Products: Lending Vaults, Borrow, Multiply
Highest APY on USDC: Vault (5.2%), Multiply (12%)
Liquidity: High, TVL $1.839B

@Loopscale

Security: 4 audits, not open source
Products: Lending Vaults, Borrow, Loop
Highest APY on USDC: Vault (8%), Loop (27%)
Liquidity: Low, TVL $85.8M

@project0

Security: 11 audits, not open source
Products: Lend, Borrow, Loop
Highest APY on USDC: Vault (2.7%), Multiply (18.7%)
Liquidity: Mid, TVL $88M

@DriftProtocol

Security: Open Source, + Audited
Products: Lend, Borrow, lending Vaults
Highest APY on USDC: Vault (14.8%), Lending (3.2%)
Liquidity: High, TVL $400M+

@hylo_so

Security: 2 audits, transparent protocol risk dashboard
Products: Leverage xSOL, and yield bearing sHYUSD

Liquidity: High, TVL $44M

@ExponentFinance

Security: Open Source, 2 Audits
Products: Fixed Yield, Farm, and Liquidity

Liquidity: mid, TVL $77M

@humafinance

Security: 2 Audits
Products: Yield Bearing Stablecoin (B2B Stablecoin Payments), + Loop Vault

Liquidity: mid, TAL $170M

@onrefinance

@RECCFinance

@perena

@DeFiCarrot

A reasonably analogy is traditional finance.

Is any one company winning everything? No.

They each have their strengths and weaknesses, but ultimately the top 5-10 are all doing just fine.

I think this will also be true for the top blockchains.

There is a false assumption that Solana needs to “win perps”.

The reality is that no one wins everything.

A general purpose blockchain has to make tradeoffs to accommodate multiple usecases.

Solana simply needs to be competitive on perps, and everything else.

You don’t need to win them all. But you need to have an environment that allows every team to have a chance to be competitive.

20% marketshare in every segment of DeFi is more valuable than 100% of marketshare in one.

You want your retail investors to be able to use your chain for everything without have to open a new tab to use another blockchain for a usecase you don’t support.

This is how you become the global financial layer.
If you’re at Jane Street and looking for a job, reach out.

It's not about how much time you have, but how you spend it.

Spend your time wisely.

One of the most effective ways to preserve capital while staying active.

- As it pumps, you sell higher. 
- Earning fees in between.

RT @jacobvcreech: P-token is now live on testnet! https://t.co/7XGV0rpyni

I definitely agree with this notion.

But perps aren’t a fad. It’s where big traders and hyper gamblers go to do the most volume. 6x more than spot, currently. It’s an important vertical.

The solana economy is well rounded, but we still need to be competitive in every segment and provide great products and deep liquidity across all of them. Right now we aren’t competitive at all on perps. 

Building spot markets is a long and slow process for equities, commodities etc. It has to be custodied to mint on chain. Legal barriers exist. The total value of tokenized equities on Solana is extremely low, because of this.

To become the global financial layer, we still need better perps products.

Luckily, work is being done that will make this possible.

4 Largest AI Conferences in April

Jack Dorsey laid off 4,000 employees because AI is already replacing many roles. 

If you don’t want to end up in that position, you need to stay on top of AI trends!

1 | Google Cloud Next by @googlecloud
